creator: nicholas.h.briggs@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 227930
Output of ACPICA "acpidump" for HP Compaq nc4010 Notebook PC

Hardware: "HP Compaq nc4010 Notebook PC", running "FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p4"

On boot, it logs

ACPI: \134_SB.C19E.WQAE: 1 arguments were passed to a non-method ACPI object (Buffer) (20201113/nsarguments-361)

I can't tell whether this has any deleterious effects on the system.
